reviews.comment:
Esta ubicado en bajada de colectora panamericana por lo que el acceso está bueno...pertenece a la red del ACA, así que si sos socio tenes un descuento.

(Translated by Google)
It's located on the Pan-American Highway access road, so it's easily accessible...it belongs to the ACA network, so if you're a member you get a discount.
